```{r}
    low = "grey",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#FF0000",
    midpoint = median(st_rate_chik_lat$log_rate_per, na.rm = TRUE),
    limits = q,
    oob = squish,
    name = "log(Incidence per 100k)"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  labs(
    title = "Chikungunya Incidence Rate Across Municipalities",
    subtitle = "Municipalities Ordered from South(bottom) to North(top) by latitude",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Municipality"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )

print(p_muni_abs_lat)



check_order <- st_rate_chik_lat %>%
  distinct(code_muni_lat, lat) %>%
  arrange(lat) %>%
  mutate(order = row_number())

sample_labels <- check_order %>%
  slice(c(1, 50, 200, 500, 1000, 2000, 3000, 3500, n()))

ggplot(st_rate_chik_lat, aes(x = ym_date, y = code_muni_lat)) +
  geom_blank() +
  scale_y_discrete(
    breaks = sample_labels$code_muni_lat,  
    labels = paste0(round(sample_labels$lat, 2), " (", sample_labels$order, ")")
  ) +
  labs(y = "Latitude (south → north)") +
  theme_minimal()




#effect of zika

ggplot(zika_nat_month, aes(x = as.Date(paste0(ym, "-01")), y = Z_t)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  labs(
    title = "National Zika Incidence (standardized)",
    y = "Z_t (standardized)",
    x = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()



#space term

# =======================================
# Spatial effect (BYM2)
# =======================================

spatial_effect <- fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.random$space %>%
  transmute(
    space = ID,
    spatial_mean = mean
  )

# attach municipality code
spatial_effect <- spatial_effect %>%
  mutate(code_muni = space_levels[space])

# join to shapefile
muni_spatial <- muni_sf %>%
  left_join(spatial_effect, by = "code_muni")

# plot
p_spatial <- ggplot(muni_spatial) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = spatial_mean), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#0033FF",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#FF0000",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "Spatial random effect
"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Spatial Effect (BYM2)",
    subtitle = "Persistent spatial structure in Chikungunya risk"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_spatial)


#time effect

# =======================================
# Temporal effect (RW2)
# =======================================

temporal_effect <- fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.random$time %>%
  transmute(
    time = ID,
    temporal_mean = mean
  )

# get actual dates
time_lookup <- panel_chik_full %>%
  distinct(time, ym) %>%
  mutate(ym_date = as.Date(paste0(ym, "-01")))

temporal_effect <- temporal_effect %>%
  left_join(time_lookup, by = "time")

# plot
p_temporal <- ggplot(temporal_effect,
                     aes(x = ym_date, y = temporal_mean)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Temporal Effect (RW2)",
    subtitle = "National temporal trend after removing spatial structure",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Temporal random effect"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_temporal)


#space time graph

# =======================================
# Space-time interaction variance by month
# =======================================


interaction_effect <- fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.random$st_id %>%
  transmute(
    st_id = ID,
    interaction_mean = mean
  )

st_interaction <- panel_chik_full %>%
  distinct(code_muni, ym, st_id) %>%
  left_join(interaction_effect, by = "st_id") %>%
  mutate(
    ym_date = as.Date(paste0(ym, "-01"))
  )
st_interaction <- st_interaction %>%
  left_join(muni_lat, by = "code_muni") %>%
  mutate(
    code_muni_lat = factor(code_muni, levels = muni_order_lat)
  )
q_int <- quantile(st_interaction$interaction_mean,
                  c(0.01, 0.99),
                  na.rm = TRUE)

p_interaction_heat <- ggplot(
  st_interaction,
  aes(x = ym_date,
      y = code_muni_lat,
      fill = interaction_mean)
) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#0033FF",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#FF0000",
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = q_int,
    oob = squish,
    name = "Spatiotemporal\n random effect"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  labs(
    title = "Space-Time Interaction Effect",
    subtitle = "Residual municipality-specific deviations after removing spatial and temporal structure",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Municipality"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )

print(p_interaction_heat)


#beta
beta_summary <- fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.fixed

print(beta_summary)

beta_Zt <- beta_summary["Z_t", c("mean", "0.025quant", "0.975quant", "sd")]
print(beta_Zt)

exp_beta <- exp(beta_summary["Z_t", c("mean", "0.025quant", "0.975quant")])
print(exp_beta)

#summary 
fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.hyperpar

summary(fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.random$space$mean)

summary(fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.random$time$mean)

summary(fit_chik_interact_pop$summary.random$st_id$mean)
```



```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(sf)
library(geobr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)

# ======================================================
# 1.（Age–Municipality Heatmap）
# ======================================================

df_heat <- combined_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_years), age_years <= 100, !is.na(ID_MUNICIP)) %>%
  mutate(
    age_year = floor(age_years),
    code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6)
  ) %>%
  group_by(code_muni6, age_year) %>%
  summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(df_heat, aes(x = code_muni6, y = age_year, fill = cases)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    name = "Cases",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Age–Municipality Heatmap of Reported Cases",
    x = "Municipality (code_muni6)",
    y = "Age (years)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# ======================================================
# 2.（Boxplot by Municipality）
# ======================================================

df_box_chik <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 100,
    !is.na(ID_MUNICIP)
  ) %>%
  mutate(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6))

ggplot(df_box_chik, aes(x = code_muni6, y = age_years)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#fc8d62", color = "gray30", outlier.size = 0.5, outlier.alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Age Distribution by Municipality — Chikungunya (2015–2025)",
    x = "Municipality (code_muni6)",
    y = "Age (years)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# ======================================================
#  3. （Sex–Municipality Heatmap）
# ======================================================

df_heat_sex <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13),
    CS_SEXO %in% c("M", "F"),
    !is.na(ID_MUNICIP)
  ) %>%
  mutate(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6)) %>%
  group_by(code_muni6, CS_SEXO) %>%
  summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop")

# case heatmap
ggplot(df_heat_sex, aes(x = code_muni6, y = CS_SEXO, fill = cases)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    name = "Cases",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sex–Municipality Heatmap of Chikungunya Cases (2015–2025)",
    x = "Municipality (code_muni6)",
    y = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# ======================================================
# ⚖️ 4.（Female/Male Ratio Heatmap）
# ======================================================

df_sex_ratio <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13),
    CS_SEXO %in% c("M", "F"),
    !is.na(ID_MUNICIP)
  ) %>%
  mutate(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6)) %>%
  group_by(code_muni6, CS_SEXO) %>%
  summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = CS_SEXO, values_from = cases, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    total = M + F,
    female_prop = ifelse(total > 0, F / total, NA_real_),
    fm_ratio = ifelse(M > 0, F / M, NA_real_)
  )

# F/M 
ggplot(df_sex_ratio, aes(x = code_muni6, y = 1, fill = fm_ratio)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#4575b4", mid = "white", high = "#d73027",
    midpoint = 1,
    name = "F/M ratio",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Female-to-Male Case Ratio (F/M) of Chikungunya by Municipality (2015–2025)",
    x = "Municipality (code_muni6)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank()
  )

# ======================================================
# 5. （Binomial Test）
# ======================================================

df_chik <- combined_all %>%
  filter(virus == "Chikungunya", CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13), CS_SEXO %in% c("M", "F"))

female_n <- sum(df_chik$CS_SEXO == "F")
total_n  <- nrow(df_chik)

prop.test(female_n, total_n, p = 0.5, alternative = "two.sided")

# ======================================================
# 🧮 6.  (proportion test by municipality)
# ======================================================

sex_by_muni <- df_chik %>%
  group_by(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6), CS_SEXO) %>%
  summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = CS_SEXO, values_from = cases, values_fill = 0)

sex_by_muni <- sex_by_muni %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    total = M + F,
    female_prop = F / total,
    p_value = if (total < 20) {
      fisher.test(matrix(c(F, M, total - F, total - M), nrow = 2))$p.value
    } else {
      prop.test(F, total, p = 0.5)$p.value
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

mean(sex_by_muni$p_value < 0.05)


# ======================================================
# 7. （Female Prop vs -log10(p)）
# ======================================================

ggplot(sex_by_muni, aes(x = female_prop, y = -log10(p_value))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = M + F, color = p_value < 0.05), alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray60", "TRUE" = "red")) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Total Cases", range = c(1, 8)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Municipality-level Sex Difference in Chikungunya Cases",
    x = "Female Proportion",
    y = expression(-log[10](p)),
    color = "Significant?",
    size = "Cases"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

# sign vs insign municipality
sex_summary <- sex_by_muni %>%
  mutate(significant = p_value < 0.05) %>%
  summarise(
    total_cities = n(),
    significant_n = sum(significant, na.rm = TRUE),
    insignificant_n = sum(!significant, na.rm = TRUE),
    significant_prop = mean(significant, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

sex_summary

```



Major age group focus
```{r}

age_summary_chik <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13),
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 100
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cases = n(),
    Q1 = quantile(age_years, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(age_years, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

age_summary_chik

```




```{r}

chik_monthly_24_54 <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13),
    !is.na(DT_SIN_PRI),
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years >= 24, age_years <= 54
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year_month = floor_date(as.Date(DT_SIN_PRI), "month")
  ) %>%
  group_by(year_month) %>%
  summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop")


ggplot(chik_monthly_24_54, aes(x = year_month, y = cases)) +
  geom_line(color = viridis::viridis(1, option = "C"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8, color = viridis::viridis(1, option = "C")) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Reported Chikungunya Cases (Age 24–54)",
    subtitle = "2015–2025 | Confirmed cases only (CLASSI_FIN 1, 13)",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of cases"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)


symptom_vars <- c(
  "FEBRE","MIALGIA","CEFALEIA","EXANTEMA","VOMITO","NAUSEA",
  "DOR_COSTAS","ARTRITE","ARTRALGIA","DOR_RETRO"
)


Chik_confirmed <- Chik_total %>%
  filter(CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1,13)) %>%   
  filter(!is.na(DT_SIN_PRI)) %>%
  mutate(
    dt   = DT_SIN_PRI,
    year = as.numeric(format(DT_SIN_PRI, "%Y"))
  )


Chik_clean <- Chik_confirmed %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(symptom_vars), ~ as.numeric(.x == 1)))


symptom_summary <- Chik_clean %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(symptom_vars), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE) * 100)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to="symptom", values_to="percentage")

p_left <- ggplot(symptom_summary, aes(x = percentage, y = symptom)) +
  geom_col(fill="black") +
  labs(x="Overall %", y=NULL, title="Symptom Frequency") +
  theme_minimal()


set.seed(1)

Chik_sample <- Chik_clean %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  slice_sample(n=10) %>%        
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(dt) %>%
  mutate(case_id = row_number())

plot_matrix <- Chik_sample %>%
  select(case_id, all_of(symptom_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(symptom_vars),
               names_to="symptom",
               values_to="present")

p_right <- ggplot(plot_matrix, aes(x=symptom, y=case_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=present), shape=21, color="black", size=2) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low="white", high="black") +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(x="Symptom", y="Cases (10 per year)", title="Case-by-Symptom Matrix") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1),
        legend.position="none")

# Combine
final_plot <- p_left | p_right
final_plot


```


```{r}


library(broom)

results <- lapply(symptom_vars, function(sym){

  df <- Chik_clean %>%
    select(year, present = all_of(sym)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(present))

  fit <- glm(present ~ year, data=df, family=binomial)

  tidy_fit <- broom::tidy(fit)

  data.frame(
    symptom  = sym,
    coef_year = tidy_fit$estimate[2],
    p_value   = tidy_fit$p.value[2]
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results) %>%
  mutate(trend = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "CHANGED", "STABLE"))

print(results_df)


Chik_year_missing <- Chik_confirmed %>%
group_by(year) %>%
summarise(
 missing_rate = mean(is.na(FEBRE))  
)

print(Chik_year_missing)

symptom_year_trend <- Chik_clean %>%
group_by(year) %>%
summarise(across(all_of(symptom_vars),
                 ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE) * 100)) %>%
arrange(year)

print(symptom_year_trend)
```

```{r}

# ============================================================
# Chikungunya symptom co-occurrence UpSet plot
# ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(UpSetR)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Symptom variables & English translation
# ------------------------------------------------------------
symptom_map <- c(
  FEBRE       = "Fever",
  MIALGIA     = "Myalgia",
  CEFALEIA    = "Headache",
  EXANTEMA   = "Rash",
  VOMITO      = "Vomiting",
  NAUSEA      = "Nausea",
  DOR_COSTAS  = "Back pain",
  ARTRITE     = "Arthritis",
  ARTRALGIA   = "Arthralgia",
  DOR_RETRO   = "Retro-orbital pain"
)

symptom_vars <- names(symptom_map)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Keep confirmed chikungunya cases only
# ------------------------------------------------------------
Chik_confirmed <- Chik_total %>%
  filter(CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DT_SIN_PRI))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Convert symptom indicators to binary (0/1)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
Chik_clean <- Chik_confirmed %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(symptom_vars), ~ as.numeric(.x == 1)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Create UpSet input (list format)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
symptom_list <- lapply(symptom_vars, function(sym) {
  which(Chik_clean[[sym]] == 1)
})

names(symptom_list) <- symptom_map[symptom_vars]  # English labels

upset_input <- fromList(symptom_list)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. UpSet plot (FIXED)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
upset(
  upset_input,
  sets = colnames(upset_input), 
  order.by = "freq",
  nintersects = 40,
  point.size = 3,
  line.size = 1,
  number.angles = 30,
  sets.x.label = "Population size",
  text.scale = 1.4
)







#calculate percentage of each combo
library(dplyr)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Symptom variables
# ------------------------------------------------------------
symptom_vars <- c(
  "FEBRE","MIALGIA","CEFALEIA","EXANTEMA","VOMITO","NAUSEA",
  "DOR_COSTAS","ARTRITE","ARTRALGIA","DOR_RETRO"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Confirmed chikungunya cases only
# ------------------------------------------------------------
Chik_clean <- Chik_total %>%
  filter(CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DT_SIN_PRI)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(symptom_vars), ~ .x == 1))

N_total <- nrow(Chik_clean)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Collapse to symptom-combination level
# ------------------------------------------------------------
combo_df <- Chik_clean %>%
  count(across(all_of(symptom_vars)), name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = n / N_total,
    percentage_label = paste0(
      scales::comma(n),
      " (",
      scales::percent(percentage, accuracy = 0.1),
      ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. View / export
# ------------------------------------------------------------
print(combo_df)

# optional: export for Illustrator annotation
# write.csv(combo_df, "symptom_combinations_with_percentage.csv", row.names = FALSE)


```



sex diff symptom using 2022 population census
```{r}


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)


pop_sex <- data.frame(
  sex = c("Male", "Female"),
  population = c(98532431, 104548325)
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Symptom variables & English labels
# ------------------------------------------------------------
symptom_vars <- c(
  "FEBRE","MIALGIA","CEFALEIA","EXANTEMA","VOMITO","NAUSEA",
  "DOR_COSTAS","ARTRITE","ARTRALGIA","DOR_RETRO"
)

symptom_labels <- c(
  FEBRE = "Fever",
  MIALGIA = "Myalgia",
  CEFALEIA = "Headache",
  EXANTEMA = "Rash",
  VOMITO = "Vomiting",
  NAUSEA = "Nausea",
  DOR_COSTAS = "Back pain",
  ARTRITE = "Arthritis",
  ARTRALGIA = "Arthralgia",
  DOR_RETRO = "Retro-orbital pain"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Keep confirmed cases only + binary symptoms
# ------------------------------------------------------------
symptom_sex_inc <- Chik_total %>%
  filter(CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DT_SIN_PRI)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(symptom_vars), ~ .x == 1)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(symptom_vars),
    names_to = "symptom",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  group_by(symptom, CS_SEXO) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cases = sum(present, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    symptom = symptom_labels[symptom],
    sex = case_when(
      CS_SEXO == "M" ~ "Male",
      CS_SEXO == "F" ~ "Female",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sex)) %>%
  left_join(pop_sex, by = "sex") %>%
  mutate(
    incidence = n_cases / population * 1e5,
    inc_plot = ifelse(sex == "Male", -incidence, incidence)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Define ordering: total incidence across sexes
# ------------------------------------------------------------

order_levels <- symptom_sex_inc %>%
  group_by(symptom) %>%
  summarise(total_inc = sum(incidence), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(total_inc) %>%
  pull(symptom)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plot mirrored incidence bar chart
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggplot(
  symptom_sex_inc,
  aes(
    x = inc_plot,
    y = factor(symptom, levels = order_levels),
    fill = sex
  )
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = abs,
    name = "Incidence (per 100,000 population)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Male" = "#00BFC4", "Female" = "#F8766D")
  ) +
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    fill = NULL,
    title = "Chikungunya Symptom Incidence by Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

```



symptom by age using 2022 population census
```{r}


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ============================================================
# 1️⃣ Age group population (IBGE 2022)
# ============================================================

pop_age <- data.frame(
  age_group = c("<15","15–29","30–44","45–59","≥60"),
  population = c(
    12704860 + 13749440 + 13674961,
    14375942 + 15466463 + 15469723,
    15473117 + 16172791 + 16072170,
    13640112 + 12598581 + 11569106,
    9944389 + 7876232 + 5858536 +
      3847379 + 2475030 + 1329203 +
      579729 + 165178 + 37814
  )
)

# ============================================================
# 2️⃣ Prepare age groups
# ============================================================

Chik_age_clean <- Chik_total %>%
  filter(CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_years)) %>%
  mutate(
    age_group = case_when(
      age_years < 15 ~ "<15",
      age_years >= 15 & age_years <= 29 ~ "15–29",
      age_years >= 30 & age_years <= 44 ~ "30–44",
      age_years >= 45 & age_years <= 59 ~ "45–59",
      age_years >= 60 ~ "≥60"
    ),
    age_group = factor(
      age_group,
      levels = c("<15","15–29","30–44","45–59","≥60")
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(symptom_vars), ~ .x == 1))

# ============================================================
# 3️⃣ Summarise + calculate incidence
# ============================================================

symptom_age_inc <- Chik_age_clean %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(symptom_vars),
    names_to = "symptom",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  group_by(age_group, symptom) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cases = sum(present, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(pop_age, by = "age_group") %>%
  mutate(
    incidence = n_cases / population * 1e5,
    symptom = symptom_labels[symptom]
  )

# ============================================================
# 4️⃣ Plot incidence heatmap
# ============================================================

ggplot(
  symptom_age_inc,
  aes(x = age_group, y = symptom, fill = incidence)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "white",
    high = "#D73027",
    name = "Incidence\n(per 100,000)"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Age group",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Chikungunya Symptom Incidence by Age Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )




```

pop_age <- gamdata %>%
  rename(age_year = Age, race_label = Race, population = Population) %>%
  mutate(
    age_year = as.integer(age_year),
    race_label = recode(race_label, "Pardo" = "Pardo (Mixed)")
  ) %>%
  group_by(age_year) %>%
  summarise(pop_age = sum(population, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


cases_age_year_virus <- combined_all %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(format(as.Date(DT_SIN_PRI), "%Y")),
    age_year = pmin(100L, floor(age_years)),
    confirmed = case_when(
      virus == "Zika" & CLASSI_FIN == 1 ~ TRUE,
      virus == "Chikungunya" & CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13) ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(confirmed, !is.na(age_year), age_year <= 100) %>%
  count(virus, year, age_year, name = "cases")

age_incidence <- cases_age_year_virus %>%
  left_join(pop_age, by = "age_year") %>%
  mutate(
    incidence_per_100k = cases / pop_age * 100000
  )
age_incidence_mean <- age_incidence %>%
  group_by(virus, age_year) %>%
  summarise(
    cases = sum(cases),
    pop_age = first(pop_age),
    incidence_per_100k = cases / pop_age * 100000,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(age_incidence_mean,
       aes(x = age_year, y = incidence_per_100k, color = virus)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Chikungunya" = "#fc8d62",
                                "Zika" = "#66c2a5")) +
  labs(
    title = "Age-specific Incidence per 100k (Average 2015–2025)",
    x = "Age (years)",
    y = "Incidence per 100,000",
    color = "Virus"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)



ggplot(age_incidence, aes(x = year, y = age_year, fill = incidence_per_100k)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  facet_wrap(~ virus, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Age-Year Specific Incidence Heatmap (per 100k)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Age",
    fill = "Incidence"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )




```{r}

race_year_summary <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    CLASSI_FIN %in% c(1, 13),
    year >= 2015,
    year <= 2025,
    !is.na(CS_RACA)
  ) %>%
  group_by(year, CS_RACA) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    race_label = case_when(
      CS_RACA == 1 ~ "White",
      CS_RACA == 2 ~ "Black",
      CS_RACA == 3 ~ "Asian",
      CS_RACA == 4 ~ "Pardo (Mixed)",
      CS_RACA == 5 ~ "Indigenous",
      CS_RACA == 9 ~ "Unknown",
      TRUE ~ "Unspecified"
    )
  )

ggplot(race_year_summary,
       aes(x = year, y = n, fill = race_label)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +   # 👈 关键
  labs(
    title = "Ethnicity distribution of confirmed chikungunya cases (2015–2025)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of confirmed cases",
    fill = "Race / Ethnicity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


```




updated survival curve
```{r}
# =========================================================
# Packages (exactly from the tutorial)
# =========================================================
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(survival)
library(ggsurvfit)

# =========================================================
# 0) Helper
# =========================================================
as_date_safe <- function(x) as.Date(x)

# =========================================================
# 1) Build survival dataset for 3 intervals
# =========================================================
build_surv_dataset_3intervals <- function(df, virus_label, interval, group_var,
                                         xlim_days = c(0, 180)) {

  df <- df %>%
    filter(virus == virus_label) %>%
    mutate(
      onset   = as_date_safe(DT_SIN_PRI),
      hosp    = as_date_safe(DT_INTERNA),
      death   = as_date_safe(DT_OBITO),
      end_fu  = as_date_safe(DT_ENCERRA),
      grp     = droplevels(factor(.data[[group_var]]))
    )

  if (interval == "onset_to_death") {
    d <- df %>%
      mutate(
        t_event  = death_delay,
        t_censor = as.numeric(end_fu - hosp),
        status   = ifelse(case_status == "Death" & !is.na(t_event), 1L, 0L),
        t_obs    = ifelse(status == 1L, t_event, t_censor),
        t_obs    = ifelse(is.na(t_obs), xlim_days[2], t_obs),
        t_obs    = pmin(pmax(t_obs, xlim_days[1]), xlim_days[2])
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(t_obs), !is.na(grp))
  }

  if (interval == "onset_to_hosp") {
    d <- df %>%
      mutate(
        t_event  = hosp_delay,
        t_censor = as.numeric(end_fu - hosp),
        status   = ifelse(!is.na(t_event), 1L, 0L),
        t_obs    = ifelse(status == 1L, t_event, t_censor),
        t_obs    = ifelse(is.na(t_obs), xlim_days[2], t_obs),
        t_obs    = pmin(pmax(t_obs, xlim_days[1]), xlim_days[2])
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(t_obs), !is.na(grp))
  }

  if (interval == "hosp_to_death") {
    d <- df %>%
      filter(!is.na(hosp)) %>%
      mutate(
        t_event  = as.numeric(death - hosp),
        t_censor = as.numeric(end_fu - hosp),
        status   = ifelse(case_status == "Death" & !is.na(t_event), 1L, 0L),
        t_obs    = ifelse(status == 1L, t_event, t_censor),
        t_obs    = ifelse(is.na(t_obs), xlim_days[2], t_obs),
        t_obs    = pmin(pmax(t_obs, xlim_days[1]), xlim_days[2])
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(t_obs), t_obs >= 0, !is.na(grp))
  }

  d
}

# =========================================================
# 2) Kaplan–Meier plot
# =========================================================
plot_km_interval <- function(df, interval, group_var,
                             xlim_days = c(0, 180),
                             title_prefix = NULL) {

  interval_label <- dplyr::case_when(
    interval == "onset_to_hosp"  ~ "Onset → Hospitalization",
    interval == "hosp_to_death"  ~ "Hospitalization → Death",
    interval == "onset_to_death" ~ "Onset → Death",
    TRUE ~ interval
  )

  if (is.null(title_prefix)) title_prefix <- "Kaplan–Meier"

  d <- build_surv_dataset_3intervals(
    df = df,
    virus_label = "Chikungunya",
    interval = interval,
    group_var = group_var,
    xlim_days = xlim_days
  )

  if (nrow(d) < 10 || dplyr::n_distinct(d$grp) < 2) {
    message("[SKIP] ", interval_label, " by ", group_var)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  if (group_var == "CS_SEXO") {
    d <- d %>%
      filter(grp %in% c("M", "F")) %>%
      droplevels()
  }
  if (group_var == "race_label") {
    d <- d %>%
      filter(grp %in% c("Asian", "Black","Indigenous","Pardo (Mixed)","White")) %>%
      droplevels()
  }


  survfit2(Surv(t_obs, status) ~ grp, data = d) |>
    ggsurvfit() +
    add_confidence_interval() +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim_days) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(title_prefix, ": ", interval_label, " (Chikungunya)"),
      x = "Days",
      y = "Survival probability",
      color = group_var
    )
}

# =========================================================
# 3) Generate the 9 plots
# =========================================================
interval_specs <- list(
  onset_to_hosp  = list(xlim = c(0, 60)),
  hosp_to_death  = list(xlim = c(0, 60)),
  onset_to_death = list(xlim = c(0, 180))
)

group_vars <- c(
  age  = "age_group_surv",
  sex  = "CS_SEXO",
  race = "race_label"
)

for (int_name in names(interval_specs)) {
  for (gname in names(group_vars)) {

    p <- plot_km_interval(
      df = combined_all,
      interval = int_name,
      group_var = group_vars[[gname]],
      xlim_days = interval_specs[[int_name]]$xlim,
      title_prefix = paste0("KM by ", gname)
    )

    if (!is.null(p)) print(p)
  }
}

#log rank test

for (int_name in names(interval_specs)) {
  for (gname in names(group_vars)) {

    cat("\n==============================\n")
    cat("Interval:", int_name, "| Group:", gname, "\n")

    # ---- 1) build survival dataset
    d <- build_surv_dataset_3intervals(
      df = combined_all,
      virus_label = "Chikungunya",
      interval = int_name,
      group_var = group_vars[[gname]],
      xlim_days = interval_specs[[int_name]]$xlim
    )

    # ---- 2) filter unwanted levels
    if (group_vars[[gname]] == "CS_SEXO") {
      d <- d %>%
        filter(grp %in% c("M", "F")) %>%
        droplevels()
    }

    if (group_vars[[gname]] == "race_label") {
      d <- d %>%
        filter(grp %in% c(
          "Asian",
          "Black",
          "Indigenous",
          "Pardo (Mixed)",
          "White"
        )) %>%
        droplevels()
    }

    # ---- 3) skip if not enough data
    if (nrow(d) < 10 || dplyr::n_distinct(d$grp) < 2) {
      cat("SKIP (insufficient data after filtering)\n")
      next
    }

    # ---- 4) log-rank test
    lr <- survdiff(Surv(t_obs, status) ~ grp, data = d)

    print(lr)

    # ---- 5) also print p-value explicitly
    p_val <- 1 - pchisq(lr$chisq, df = length(lr$n) - 1)
    cat("Log-rank p-value =", format.pval(p_val, digits = 3), "\n")
  }
}





#Cox regression model
library(gtsummary)


run_cox <- function(d, formula_rhs) {

  fit <- coxph(
    as.formula(paste0("Surv(t_obs, status) ~ ", formula_rhs)),
    data = d
  )

  tbl <- tbl_regression(
    fit,
    exp = TRUE
  )

  list(
    fit = fit,
    table = tbl
  )
}

cox_results <- list()

for (int_name in names(interval_specs)) {
  for (gname in names(group_vars)) {

    cat("\n==============================\n")
    cat("Interval:", int_name, "| Group:", gname, "\n")

    d <- build_surv_dataset_3intervals(
      df = combined_all,
      virus_label = "Chikungunya",
      interval = int_name,
      group_var = group_vars[[gname]],
      xlim_days = interval_specs[[int_name]]$xlim
    )
    d <- d %>%
  mutate(grp = factor(grp, ordered = FALSE))

    if (group_vars[[gname]] == "CS_SEXO") {
      d <- d %>%
        filter(grp %in% c("M", "F")) %>%
        droplevels()
    }
     if (group_vars[[gname]] == "race_label") {
      d <- d %>%
        filter(grp %in% c("Asian", "Black","Indigenous","Pardo (Mixed)","White")) %>%
        droplevels()
    }

    if (nrow(d) < 10 || dplyr::n_distinct(d$grp) < 2) {
      cat("SKIP (insufficient data)\n")
      next
    }

    res <- run_cox(d, "grp")

    cox_results[[paste(int_name, gname, sep = "__")]] <- res

    print(summary(res$fit))

    print(res$table)
  }
}

res <- run_cox(d, "grp")

cox_results[[paste(int_name, gname, sep = "__")]] <- res

print(summary(res$fit))

print(res$table)

# --- PH assumption test ---
ph_test <- cox.zph(res$fit)
print(ph_test)

```



median delay map
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(sf)

# --------------------------------------------------
# 0)  municipality shapefile
# --------------------------------------------------
muni_sf <- read_municipality(
  year = 2020,
  showProgress = FALSE,
  cache = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(code_muni), 1, 6))

# municipality × virus
all_muni_virus <- expand.grid(
  code_muni6 = unique(muni_sf$code_muni6),
  virus = unique(combined_all$virus)
)

# --------------------------------------------------
death_delay_muni <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    case_status == "Death",
    !is.na(death_delay),
    death_delay >= 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6)) %>%
  group_by(code_muni6) %>%
  summarise(
    median_delay = median(death_delay, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

death_delay_map <- muni_sf %>%
  left_join(death_delay_muni, by = "code_muni6")

ggplot(death_delay_map) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = median_delay), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Median delay (days)",
    limits = c(0, 50),
    breaks = seq(0, 50, 10),
    oob = squish,
    na.value = "lightgrey"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Time from Symptom Onset to Death by Municipality\n(Chikungunya, 2015–2025)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


report_delay_muni <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    !is.na(report_delay),
    report_delay >= 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6)) %>%
  group_by(code_muni6) %>%
  summarise(
    median_delay = median(report_delay, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

report_delay_map <- muni_sf %>%
  left_join(report_delay_muni, by = "code_muni6")

ggplot(report_delay_map) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = median_delay), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Median delay (days)",
    limits = c(0, 50),
    breaks = seq(0, 50, 10),
    oob = squish,
    na.value = "lightgrey"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Time from Symptom Onset to Notification by Municipality\n(Chikungunya, 2015–2025)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


hosp_delay_muni <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    HOSPITALIZ == "1",
    !is.na(hosp_delay),
    hosp_delay >= 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6)) %>%
  group_by(code_muni6) %>%
  summarise(
    median_delay = median(hosp_delay, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hosp_delay_map <- muni_sf %>%
  left_join(hosp_delay_muni, by = "code_muni6")

ggplot(hosp_delay_map) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = median_delay), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Median delay (days)",
    limits = c(0, 50),
    breaks = seq(0, 50, 10),
    oob = squish,
    na.value = "lightgrey"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Time from Symptom Onset to Hospitalization by Municipality\n(Chikungunya, 2015–2025)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# --------------------------------------------------
# 4️⃣ Hospitalization → Death（median delay，Chikungunya only）
# --------------------------------------------------

hosp_to_death_delay_muni <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    virus == "Chikungunya",
    HOSPITALIZ == "1",
    case_status == "Death",
    !is.na(DT_INTERNA),
    !is.na(DT_OBITO)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    code_muni6 = substr(as.character(ID_MUNICIP), 1, 6),
    hosp_to_death_delay = as.numeric(as.Date(DT_OBITO) - as.Date(DT_INTERNA))
  ) %>%
  filter(hosp_to_death_delay >= 0) %>%  
  group_by(code_muni6) %>%
  summarise(
    median_delay = median(hosp_to_death_delay, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hosp_to_death_delay_map <- muni_sf %>%
  left_join(hosp_to_death_delay_muni, by = "code_muni6")

ggplot(hosp_to_death_delay_map) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = median_delay), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name   = "Median delay (days)",
    limits = c(0, 50),
    breaks = seq(0, 50, 10),
    oob    = squish,
    na.value = "lightgrey"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Time from Hospitalization to Death by Municipality\n(Chikungunya, 2015–2025)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()



```
